title: HD Wall Mirror Self Adhesive Glass Mirror High Clear Mirrors Stick On Frameless Large Adhesive Mirrors Tile for Bathroom, Bedroom, Living Room, Hallway Decoration(40 x 30cm)
features: 【Multiple Ways to Use】-- Wall mirror come with strong foam glue pad, easy to attach the mirror to the wall. Self adhesive Mirror is frameless, allow you can DIY it to make decoration mirror with need.
【High Clear】-- This mirror made of lead-free glass with high quality aluminum coating, eco-friendly and durable, good reflection effect, clear, real and soft image, don't distort.

【Polished Edges】-- The edges of the mirror are polished for a clean appearance. As it is a glass mirror, there may be a risk of cuts. We recommend wearing gloves to protect your hands during the installation process.

【Economic and Convenient】-- This self adhesive mirror is 40 x 30cm/16 x 12in in size, use multiple pieces to easily combine into a full-length mirror, cheaper than buying body mirrors separately, and easy to move.
【Wide Applications】-- Glass mirror tile can be used in variety of flat and smooth surface, great for doors, living room, bedroom, bathroom, gym, office, closets etc.
description: Product Description High Clear & Better Reflection Glass wall mirrors are sturdy and hard, with high quality aluminum coat mirror, better reflective effect than other similar mirror stickers Polishing and Edging All side of glass mirror be polished and rounded, can stop hurts Easy to Install Mirror tiles come with double-sided sticky foam pads, easy to stick on wall Economic and Convenient This self adhesive mirror is 40 x 30cm/16 x 12in, use multiple pieces to easily combine into a full-length mirror, cheaper than buying body mirrors separately Fit for kinds of smooth and flat surface Please stick on smooth and flat surface With Protective Film Mirrors with a protective film, protect the mirror surface from damage or scratches during transportation. Frameless Decoration Mirror Bright your room This self adhesive mirror is frameless, can be used to arrange on wall, well make your home looks more spacious, bright and attractive.
